short_text: Southee to Jadeja, 1 run, . But India get only one. Sums up their plight actually. Again Southee going for the slower sh
full_text: Southee to Jadeja, 1 run, . But India get only one. Sums up their plight actually. Again Southee going for the slower short ball into the pitch, Jadeja pulls but it's straight down Sodhi's throat, he lets it slip and Milne has a consolatory word or two after that to the leggie

short_text: Southee to Jadeja, 2 runs, straight up in the air and into no-man's land at mid-wicket. Off-pace again, Jadeja loses all
full_text: Southee to Jadeja, 2 runs, straight up in the air and into no-man's land at mid-wicket. Off-pace again, Jadeja loses all shape on this slog, but it plugs where the batsmen can scramble back for the second

short_text: Southee to Jadeja, no run, brave bowling with fielders inside the ring on the off-side, short and angled across Jadeja,
full_text: Southee to Jadeja, no run, brave bowling with fielders inside the ring on the off-side, short and angled across Jadeja, who maybe wasn't expecting that, reaches out but can't connect with the slash, wants a wide. Erasmus is stone-faced

short_text: Southee to Jadeja, , when you miss to this man, Jadeja won't spare you, low full-toss on the stumps, Jadeja smashes it i
full_text: Southee to Jadeja, , when you miss to this man, Jadeja won't spare you, low full-toss on the stumps, Jadeja smashes it into the crowd over mid-wicket. Clean hit and it has cleared the long fence

short_text: Southee to Jadeja, no run, he doesn't take the run. Fair enough. He wants to face everything. Off-pace good length deliv
full_text: Southee to Jadeja, no run, he doesn't take the run. Fair enough. He wants to face everything. Off-pace good length delivery that cramps Jadeja up who can only push it to long-on. Realised there wasn't two on offer, decided not to take it

short_text: Southee to Jadeja, 2 runs, Southee isn't happy with Neesham for throwing it to Conway. Jadeja gets back for two, comes d
full_text: Southee to Jadeja, 2 runs, Southee isn't happy with Neesham for throwing it to Conway. Jadeja gets back for two, comes down the track and hits the pull to the wide long-on. Aggressive running gives two

short_text: Boult to Jadeja, 1 run, much better attempted yorker on the stumps, heaved to deep square, only a single and that's what
full_text: Boult to Jadeja, 1 run, much better attempted yorker on the stumps, heaved to deep square, only a single and that's what Jadeja too wants

short_text: Boult to Jadeja, , respite for India. Low full-toss angling in, with the short boundary to hit to, Jadeja swings it behi
full_text: Boult to Jadeja, , respite for India. Low full-toss angling in, with the short boundary to hit to, Jadeja swings it behind square for a one-bounce four

short_text: Boult to Thakur, Caught by Guptill!! The slower ball does it again, Thakur looked like he didn't pick it, even if he did
full_text: Boult to Thakur, Caught by Guptill!! The slower ball does it again, Thakur looked like he didn't pick it, even if he did, he can only loft it straight up in the air towards long-off. Guptill and you know the rest. Just a note: This was easier than the Hardik Pandya catch.

short_text: Boult to Thakur, no run, two dots in a row. Pacy short ball, Thakur hooks and misses. Flies over the bat. Called as one
full_text: Boult to Thakur, no run, two dots in a row. Pacy short ball, Thakur hooks and misses. Flies over the bat. Called as one for the over

short_text: Boult to Thakur, no run, chaos! Utter confusion. Boult delivers it on a short of length on off, defended past the bowler
full_text: Boult to Thakur, no run, chaos! Utter confusion. Boult delivers it on a short of length on off, defended past the bowler, Thakur belatedly sends Jadeja back but it's enough as he comes back before mid-off could cause damage

short_text: Boult to Hardik Pandya, Caught by Guptill!! When it's not your day, it just doesn't go your way. Off-pace slower ball fr
full_text: Boult to Hardik Pandya, Caught by Guptill!! When it's not your day, it just doesn't go your way. Off-pace slower ball from Boult, making Hardik Pandya do all the work, he lofts but Guptill at long-off didn't have to move an inch. Straight to him and pretty sure one of the easiest catches he must have taken in his career. The Indian fans don't know what has hit them. Funeral-like atmosphere inside Dubai now.

short_text: Milne to Jadeja, , Jadeja does something out of the ordinary and pulls it off. Gets across his stumps and scoops it wide
full_text: Milne to Jadeja, , Jadeja does something out of the ordinary and pulls it off. Gets across his stumps and scoops it wide of the diving Conway. Another boundary off the last ball of the over, but still 8 off that over and end of Milne as well

short_text: Milne to Hardik Pandya, 1 run, looked like a good hit when it came off the bat at first viewing, but again just a single
full_text: Milne to Hardik Pandya, 1 run, looked like a good hit when it came off the bat at first viewing, but again just a single to long-on. Full and Hardik Pandya lofts with the straightest of bats, but the fielder moves so quickly and fields on the bounce

short_text: Milne to Jadeja, 1 run, low full-toss with mid-off up, Jadeja drives to long-on and the fielders keep it to a single
full_text: Milne to Jadeja, 1 run, low full-toss with mid-off up, Jadeja drives to long-on and the fielders keep it to a single

short_text: Milne to Hardik Pandya, 1 run, right up there now, can't get under that one at 146kph, Hardik Pandya drives to long-on
full_text: Milne to Hardik Pandya, 1 run, right up there now, can't get under that one at 146kph, Hardik Pandya drives to long-on

short_text: Milne to Hardik Pandya, no run, off-pace off-cutter this time, cramps Hardik Pandya up who was looking to go big on the
full_text: Milne to Hardik Pandya, no run, off-pace off-cutter this time, cramps Hardik Pandya up who was looking to go big on the off-side, can only chop it to cover instead

short_text: Milne to Jadeja, 1 run, short into the wicket, Milne stays round the wicket and bangs it in, Jadeja pulls to deep square
full_text: Milne to Jadeja, 1 run, short into the wicket, Milne stays round the wicket and bangs it in, Jadeja pulls to deep square

short_text: Boult to Hardik Pandya, , not sure when the last boundary came, but it seems like ages ago. Short third man and backward
full_text: Boult to Hardik Pandya, , not sure when the last boundary came, but it seems like ages ago. Short third man and backward point were inside - so a poor ball from Boult, short and wide outside off, Hardik Pandya arches back and cuts over those two, wide of backward point to be precise and no chance for the sweeper in the deep. A smile-bringing boundary for India, if one may call it that way. In fact,

short_text: Boult to Jadeja, 1 run, this is fantastic bowling from Boult, tucks up Jadeja with an inslanter on a short of length, it
full_text: Boult to Jadeja, 1 run, this is fantastic bowling from Boult, tucks up Jadeja with an inslanter on a short of length, it keeps coming back into Jadeja who dabs softly in front of backward point for a single

short_text: Boult to Hardik Pandya, 1 run, off-pace short of length delivery on off, punched with a straight bat to long-on
full_text: Boult to Hardik Pandya, 1 run, off-pace short of length delivery on off, punched with a straight bat to long-on

short_text: Boult to Jadeja, 1 run, full on off, Jadeja drives in the air but again it is just a single to long-on
full_text: Boult to Jadeja, 1 run, full on off, Jadeja drives in the air but again it is just a single to long-on

short_text: Boult to Jadeja, no run, skiddy short of length delivery that keeps a bit low outside off, Jadeja pulls over the ball an
full_text: Boult to Jadeja, no run, skiddy short of length delivery that keeps a bit low outside off, Jadeja pulls over the ball and misses

full_text: Boult to Hardik Pandya, 1 run, short of length on middle, swat-pulled with lots of bottom-hand to deep square

full_text: Ish Sodhi to Hardik Pandya, 1 run, nicely tossed up on leg-stump, Hardik Pandya cautiously flicks to deep mid-wicket

full_text: Ish Sodhi to Jadeja, no run, very full on the stumps, clipped to Neesham at mid-wicket

short_text: Ish Sodhi to Jadeja, no run, well-bowled. Saw Jadeja coming down the track, dragged the length back, Jadeja eventually d
full_text: Ish Sodhi to Jadeja, no run, well-bowled. Saw Jadeja coming down the track, dragged the length back, Jadeja eventually defends to cover

short_text: Ish Sodhi to Hardik Pandya, 1 run, bouncing leggie outside off, cramps Hardik Pandya on the slash, he is lucky that the
full_text: Ish Sodhi to Hardik Pandya, 1 run, bouncing leggie outside off, cramps Hardik Pandya on the slash, he is lucky that the top-edge does not carry to sweeper

full_text: Ish Sodhi to Hardik Pandya, , thrown up wide outside off, too wide

full_text: Ish Sodhi to Jadeja, 1 run, full-toss, hammered back at Ish Sodhi, along the ground, the bowler takes the pace off the shot

short_text: Milne to Hardik Pandya, no run, short of length with inseam towards off, Hardik Pandya pushes to cover and wants a quick
full_text: Milne to Hardik Pandya, no run, short of length with inseam towards off, Hardik Pandya pushes to cover and wants a quick single, Jadeja though disagrees

short_text: Milne to Hardik Pandya, 2 runs, short of length outside off, dabbed fine and a tumbling stop from Ish Sodhi running from
full_text: Milne to Hardik Pandya, 2 runs, short of length outside off, dabbed fine and a tumbling stop from Ish Sodhi running from third man, but they come back for the second

short_text: Milne to Jadeja, leg byes, 1 run, the sharp indecker now, cuts in at pace and raps a hopping Jadeja on the pad, just abo
full_text: Milne to Jadeja, leg byes, 1 run, the sharp indecker now, cuts in at pace and raps a hopping Jadeja on the pad, just above the kneeroll, umpire Richard Kettleborough is one of the best in the world, he says not out and New Zealand go upstairs. No bat but it was going over, so the Kiwis will lose a review

short_text: Milne to Pant, Bowled!! Knocked 'im over. Milne punches the air in delight.  This was always on the cards, the pressure
full_text: Milne to Pant, Bowled!! Knocked 'im over. Milne punches the air in delight.  This was always on the cards, the pressure was building up on the left-hander and he swings wildly only to see a thin tickle shatter the stumps. 144kph inslanter from Milne, on a fullish length, with the angle it came in and Pant eyed mid-wicket with a big hoick, only hears the death rattle. India slip into further chaos.

short_text: Milne to Pant, , down leg, wayward delivery, Pant swipes and misses
full_text: Milne to Pant, , down leg, wayward delivery, Pant swipes and misses

short_text: Milne to Hardik Pandya, 1 run, short of length hard into the pitch, and towards the body, tucked wide of mid-wicket
full_text: Milne to Hardik Pandya, 1 run, short of length hard into the pitch, and towards the body, tucked wide of mid-wicket

short_text: Milne to Pant, 1 run, slower ball angled in from round the wicket, Pant swipes and Ish Sodhi at short fine goes to his r
full_text: Milne to Pant, 1 run, slower ball angled in from round the wicket, Pant swipes and Ish Sodhi at short fine goes to his right and dives to come up with the ball. Keeps it to a single

short_text: Ish Sodhi to Pant, leg byes, 1 run, again this leg-stump, down the leg line working, off the pad as Pant misses the glan
full_text: Ish Sodhi to Pant, leg byes, 1 run, again this leg-stump, down the leg line working, off the pad as Pant misses the glance, this time they take a legbye

short_text: Ish Sodhi to Hardik Pandya, 1 run, thrown up wide outside off, Hardik Pandya reaches out and cuts to sweeper cover
full_text: Ish Sodhi to Hardik Pandya, 1 run, thrown up wide outside off, Hardik Pandya reaches out and cuts to sweeper cover

short_text: Ish Sodhi to Pant, 1 run, tossed up leggie, Pant sits down to slog-sweep but drags it to deep square
full_text: Ish Sodhi to Pant, 1 run, tossed up leggie, Pant sits down to slog-sweep but drags it to deep square

short_text: Ish Sodhi to Pant, no run, turning in, down leg, brushes the pad of Pant as he flicks and misses
full_text: Ish Sodhi to Pant, no run, turning in, down leg, brushes the pad of Pant as he flicks and misses

short_text: Ish Sodhi to Hardik Pandya, 1 run, What an effort from Neesham at deep backward square backpedalling. To be fair it was
full_text: Ish Sodhi to Hardik Pandya, 1 run, What an effort from Neesham at deep backward square backpedalling. To be fair it was a lucky one. He tried to catch that one-handed but it hit his hand and lobbed inside. Hardik Pandya with a fat top-edge and poor running sees them only get a single. Were they assuming it would go all the way? Would have been one of the catches of this World Cup but Neesham was never going to pull that off, with his body going backwards with the cushions very close to his feet at the same time

short_text: Ish Sodhi to Pant, 1 run, Pant uses his feet and lofts to long-on. Wants to get a move on. Is this the start of somethin
full_text: Ish Sodhi to Pant, 1 run, Pant uses his feet and lofts to long-on. Wants to get a move on. Is this the start of something spectacular?

full_text: Southee to Pant, 1 run, slower delivery, Pant flicks it to deep mid-wicket

full_text: Southee to Hardik Pandya, 1 run, short of length delivery on the leg stump, Hardik Pandya glances it to deep square leg

full_text: Southee to Hardik Pandya, no run, good length delivery on the off stump, Pandya defends off the back foot

full_text: Southee to Pant, 1 run, oh a proper slog across the line from Pant, wanted to hit that over square leg, luckily the inside edge rolls past the stumps

full_text: Southee to Hardik Pandya, 1 run, slow short delivery, Hardik waits and pulls it to deep mid-wicket

short_text: Southee to Hardik Pandya, no run, slower delivery into the wicket, Hardik checks the defence, the ball goes uppishly but
full_text: Southee to Hardik Pandya, no run, slower delivery into the wicket, Hardik checks the defence, the ball goes uppishly but luckily for India it goes to the vacant mid-on region and not to hand at mid-wicket

short_text: Santner to Hardik Pandya, 1 run, oh turn, bit turn! India will hope to get 140 and someone please keep dew away. Pandya
full_text: Santner to Hardik Pandya, 1 run, oh turn, bit turn! India will hope to get 140 and someone please keep dew away. Pandya adjusts and pushes it to point

full_text: Santner to Pant, 1 run, flatter and on the stumps, pushed to long-on

full_text: Santner to Hardik Pandya, 1 run, another leg-side dart, Pandya glances to long leg

full_text: Santner to Hardik Pandya, no run, a very neat forward defence from Hardik Pandya to this away-spinner

full_text: Santner to Hardik Pandya, 2 runs, short and on the leg stump, glanced to fine leg, easy two

full_text: Ish Sodhi to Pant, 1 run, Pant moves across to tee off, but Ish Sodhi follows him with a full ball, flicked to deep mid-wicket

full_text: Ish Sodhi to Hardik Pandya, 1 run, Pandya reaches out to drive this away-spinner, outside edge rolls to the left of short third man

full_text: Ish Sodhi to Pant, 1 run, shortish and on the off stump, Pant punches off the back foot to deep cover

full_text: Ish Sodhi to Pant, no run, yorker just outside off stump, Pant digs it out

full_text: Ish Sodhi to Hardik Pandya, 1 run, spinning away, pushed to long-on

short_text: Ish Sodhi to Kohli, Caught by Boult!! Is that the game then? Or too early. Indian crowd muted in the Dubai. What Virat.
full_text: Ish Sodhi to Kohli, Caught by Boult!! Is that the game then? Or too early. Indian crowd muted in the Dubai. What Virat. What was this? Leggie floated up spinning away outside off stump, Sodhi says "yeah please take that on if you can." Kohli does take it on, but it's a slog-sweep across the line than an inside-out cover drive. Top edge very high. Unfortunately for India it doesn't have enough legs. Boult takes it well inside the rope on long-on and points to the boundary to show how far inside he held that. Kohli just drops his head and walks back.

short_text: Santner to Kohli, 1 run, fullish and on the stumps, Kohli flicks it to long-on
full_text: Santner to Kohli, 1 run, fullish and on the stumps, Kohli flicks it to long-on

short_text: Santner to Kohli, 2 runs, Kohli gets low and cuts this away-spinner from close to the off stump, ball cut off at deep po
full_text: Santner to Kohli, 2 runs, Kohli gets low and cuts this away-spinner from close to the off stump, ball cut off at deep point

short_text: Santner to Pant, 1 run, Pant knocks this to the left of Santner and sets off, well judged run. Got that on the outer hal
full_text: Santner to Pant, 1 run, Pant knocks this to the left of Santner and sets off, well judged run. Got that on the outer half of the bat

full_text: Santner to Kohli, 1 run, shortish delivery, Kohli drives hard off the back foot to deep cover

full_text: Santner to Kohli, no run, is Kohli getting edgy? Now runs at Santner and looks to drive hard, chops it into the off-side

full_text: Santner to Kohli, no run, flighted delivery on the off stump, Kohli pushes it towards cover. Kohli yet again looks for a non-existent run, Pant sends him back

full_text: Milne to Kohli, 1 run, short of length delivery outside off stump, Kohli dabs it to third man

short_text: Milne to Kohli, no run, short of length delivery on the off stump, Kohli looks to knock it to leg, gets an inside edge o
full_text: Milne to Kohli, no run, short of length delivery on the off stump, Kohli looks to knock it to leg, gets an inside edge onto pad

full_text: Milne to Kohli, no run, short on the stumps, Kohli lets it go. Looks at the ump for wide, doesn't get it

full_text: Milne to Pant, 1 run, allows the short of length delivery to come and punches late with angled bat, beats the dive at backward point and gets a run

full_text: Milne to Pant, no run, short of length delivery outside off stump, Pant stands tall and defends to point

full_text: Ish Sodhi to Pant, 1 run, spinning back in, Pant drives it to long-on

full_text: Ish Sodhi to Pant, no run, flatter delivery, Pant defends

short_text: Ish Sodhi to Rohit, Caught by Guptill!! Horribly mistimed. India in big trouble now. These leggies have this knack of ta
full_text: Ish Sodhi to Rohit, Caught by Guptill!! Horribly mistimed. India in big trouble now. These leggies have this knack of taking wickets with absolute drab balls. Short and asking to be hit, but the credit to Ish Sodhi is it wasn't very wide of the stumps. Rohit went back to pull but mistimed it towards long-on when he wanted to hit squarer. Long-on runs forward and dives to send Rohit back. It's 40/3. Serious pressure on India. They need to stop putting pressure on themselves and bat freely.

short_text: Ish Sodhi to Rohit, no run, flighted delivery on the leg stump, Rohit sweeps and picks out short fine leg
full_text: Ish Sodhi to Rohit, no run, flighted delivery on the leg stump, Rohit sweeps and picks out short fine leg

full_text: Ish Sodhi to Kohli, 1 run, shortish and on the leg stump, Kohli flicks behind square

full_text: Ish Sodhi to Kohli, 2 runs, Kohli looks to slog this leggie wide of long-on, gets it in the gap for two

full_text: Santner to Kohli, 1 run, on the stumps, punched away to long-on

full_text: Santner to Kohli, no run, fullish delivery, Kohli drives it back to the bowler

full_text: Santner to Kohli, no run, oh Kohli inside-edging the drive to this away-spinner, that looked tight

short_text: Santner to Kohli, no run, yes-nooo, sent back and Kohli is just home. Loud perfect call of "Noooooo" from Rohit. Kohli t
full_text: Santner to Kohli, no run, yes-nooo, sent back and Kohli is just home. Loud perfect call of "Noooooo" from Rohit. Kohli tapped this towards the left of cover, no run there, but he took off. Rohit rightly sending him back

full_text: Santner to Kohli, no run, fullish delivery outside off stump, Kohli pushes it to the off-side

full_text: Santner to Rohit, 1 run, flatter delivery outside off stump, Rohit rocks back and cuts to backward point, oh a rare fumble and they get a run

short_text: Southee to Kohli, no run, good length delivery on the off stump, Kohli defends
full_text: Southee to Kohli, no run, good length delivery on the off stump, Kohli defends

short_text: Southee to Rahul, Caught by Daryl Mitchell!! This was on. India wanted quick runs before the powerplay was over. And jus
full_text: Southee to Rahul, Caught by Daryl Mitchell!! This was on. India wanted quick runs before the powerplay was over. And just like Ishan Kishan did, KL Rahul too picks out deep backward square leg to perfection. Credit to Southee for forcing that shot with a short slower delivery on the leg stump, Rahul thought he could pull that away, but Southee took pace off and that meant this didn't travel like that Rohit Sharma six. India two down inside the powerplay. KL can't believe he's picked the fielder.

short_text: Southee to Rohit, 1 run, good length delivery on the leg stump, Rohit wrists it to deep mid-wicket
full_text: Southee to Rohit, 1 run, good length delivery on the leg stump, Rohit wrists it to deep mid-wicket

short_text: Southee to Rahul, 1 run, slot ball, Rahul drives down the ground, Southee sticks his left hand out and half-stops to mid
full_text: Southee to Rahul, 1 run, slot ball, Rahul drives down the ground, Southee sticks his left hand out and half-stops to mid-off

short_text: Southee to Rahul, no run, short of length delivery on the stumps, Rahul knocks it to leg
full_text: Southee to Rahul, no run, short of length delivery on the stumps, Rahul knocks it to leg

short_text: Southee to Rahul, , lucky, very lucky there KL Rahul. He had a wild slog at this short of length delivery outside off st
full_text: Southee to Rahul, , lucky, very lucky there KL Rahul. He had a wild slog at this short of length delivery outside off stump, the inside edge just escapes past the off stump and it runs away to the fine leg fence. India looking to maximize the powerplay

short_text: Milne to Rohit, , he's picked that away into the long leg stands. Rohit Sharma is in the house folks! Absolutely poor le
full_text: Milne to Rohit, , he's picked that away into the long leg stands. Rohit Sharma is in the house folks! Absolutely poor length ball on the pads, India have been badly waiting for anything loose and Rohit won't miss out on these offerings. Plays the wristy pick up shot and sends it soaring into the stands. India get a move on with that 15-run over

short_text: Milne to Rohit, , this time Ro doesn't miss out. If the first ball was in the slot, this was even poorer from Milne. Sho
full_text: Milne to Rohit, , this time Ro doesn't miss out. If the first ball was in the slot, this was even poorer from Milne. Short ball, means no swing, so no purpose behind this ball that has a lot of room. Ro loves pace and he cuts this fiercely over point

short_text: Milne to Rohit, no run, oh ! Quick length delivery swinging away outside off stump, Rohit thought he could smash that ov
full_text: Milne to Rohit, no run, oh ! Quick length delivery swinging away outside off stump, Rohit thought he could smash that over point, but the ball moved away late to trouble Rohit there

short_text: Milne to Rohit, no run, fullish and outside off stump, Rohit defends nicely from the crease
full_text: Milne to Rohit, no run, fullish and outside off stump, Rohit defends nicely from the crease

short_text: Milne to Rahul, 1 run, full and around the off stump, Rahul drives to mid-off for a brisk run
full_text: Milne to Rahul, 1 run, full and around the off stump, Rahul drives to mid-off for a brisk run

short_text: Milne to Rahul, , cracking cut shot! Captain brings you into the team and you bowl a short ball outside off stump, you d
full_text: Milne to Rahul, , cracking cut shot! Captain brings you into the team and you bowl a short ball outside off stump, you don't want to be repeating that. KL pounces on it and places it to the right of point, timed it pretty well

short_text: Santner to Rohit, no run, sliding down leg, Rohit misses the glance, the ball hits the thigh pad and rolls behind square
full_text: Santner to Rohit, no run, sliding down leg, Rohit misses the glance, the ball hits the thigh pad and rolls behind square

short_text: Santner to Rohit, no run, full and on the leg stump, Rohit reaches out and drives to the left of Santner, who dives and
full_text: Santner to Rohit, no run, full and on the leg stump, Rohit reaches out and drives to the left of Santner, who dives and gets his hand on the ball

short_text: Santner to Rohit, no run, shortish and on the leg stump, Rohit plays leg-side
full_text: Santner to Rohit, no run, shortish and on the leg stump, Rohit plays leg-side

short_text: Santner to Rahul, 1 run, on the leg stump, Rahul tucks to short fine leg
full_text: Santner to Rahul, 1 run, on the leg stump, Rahul tucks to short fine leg

short_text: Santner to Rohit, 1 run, leg-side ball glanced away to square leg
full_text: Santner to Rohit, 1 run, leg-side ball glanced away to square leg

short_text: Santner to Rohit, no run, oh the drifter back into the right-hander, Rohit defends off the back foot
full_text: Santner to Rohit, no run, oh the drifter back into the right-hander, Rohit defends off the back foot

short_text: Boult to Rohit, 1 run, in the airrrr, another wicket. Noooo ! Adam Milne doing his MI skipper a huge favour. Firstly it'
full_text: Boult to Rohit, 1 run, in the airrrr, another wicket. Noooo ! Adam Milne doing his MI skipper a huge favour. Firstly it's surprising to see Ro come out at three. But Boult knows he's a compulsive puller/hooker of the cricket ball. So he drops it short and gets it to rise, Rohit couldn't control the hook shot, straight to fine leg who could have taken it around his ankle. But it spills it for reasons only known to him. Did he lose it in the background?

short_text: Boult to Ishan Kishan, Caught by Daryl Mitchell!! Whipped away, but straight to the fielder. Ishan Kishan, that was a tr
full_text: Boult to Ishan Kishan, Caught by Daryl Mitchell!! Whipped away, but straight to the fielder. Ishan Kishan, that was a trap for you bowling on the pads with a man in the deep. He played a lovely flick shot, but hit it too well for his own liking. Hit that with power and deep backward square leg swallows it. Can't blame him much. The shot was on, but he didn't place it well. New Zealand get the man who was itching to take on the bowlers in the powerplay. Big, big wicket.

short_text: Boult to Ishan Kishan, no run, oh cuts hard, just a bit in the air and just short of Glenn Phillips at backward point. S
full_text: Boult to Ishan Kishan, no run, oh cuts hard, just a bit in the air and just short of Glenn Phillips at backward point. Santner jumps as he thought they had the first wicket. Good length tight around off stump, Ishan Kishan gave a bit of room and slashed that very well, picked out the fielder

short_text: Boult to Ishan Kishan, no run, again plays across the line but this time gets hit on the thigh pad by this short of leng
full_text: Boult to Ishan Kishan, no run, again plays across the line but this time gets hit on the thigh pad by this short of length delivery. Wanted to hit that behind square as it was down leg

short_text: Boult to Ishan Kishan, , there's the intent India and Kohli will love. Fullish delivery, Ishan Kishan doesn't have any b
full_text: Boult to Ishan Kishan, , there's the intent India and Kohli will love. Fullish delivery, Ishan Kishan doesn't have any baggage behind him. He's fresh, he plays across the line, but that was a "yeah I have played him in the nets" kind of uppish flick over mid-wicket

short_text: Boult to Rahul, 1 run, the surprise short delivery, doesn't rise as much as Boult wanted, Rahul manages to swivel pull t
full_text: Boult to Rahul, 1 run, the surprise short delivery, doesn't rise as much as Boult wanted, Rahul manages to swivel pull to square leg, mistimed but he gets off strike

short_text: Southee to Rahul, 1 run, scrambled seam length delivery, Rahul dabs it the right of backward point and keeps strike
full_text: Southee to Rahul, 1 run, scrambled seam length delivery, Rahul dabs it the right of backward point and keeps strike

short_text: Southee to Rahul, no run, good length delivery outside the off stump, Rahul solid behind the line and defending
full_text: Southee to Rahul, no run, good length delivery outside the off stump, Rahul solid behind the line and defending

short_text: Southee to Rahul, , in the airrrr, mistimed, just past the diving mid-on fielder. Oh very conservative from KL and he ge
full_text: Southee to Rahul, , in the airrrr, mistimed, just past the diving mid-on fielder. Oh very conservative from KL and he gets away. Why was mid-on so wide Kane? Simple full delivery, slot ball, Rahul wanted the straight drive, but the bat turned in his hands and it flew towards mid-on. For a moment he thought he was in trouble. Milne the fielder who tried to dive and stretch his right hand up to grab the ball but it doesn't stick like Woakes yesterday

short_text: Southee to Rahul, no run, now Southee goes wide of the crease to create the extra angle, but it's not full enough to tro
full_text: Southee to Rahul, no run, now Southee goes wide of the crease to create the extra angle, but it's not full enough to trouble KL. Pushed off the back foot to point

short_text: Southee to Rahul, no run, "no, no," says KL after cautiously tucking this short of length delivery to mid-wicket
full_text: Southee to Rahul, no run, "no, no," says KL after cautiously tucking this short of length delivery to mid-wicket

short_text: Southee to Rahul, no run, just takes a step across to cover the outswing and defends this length delivery very watchfull
full_text: Southee to Rahul, no run, just takes a step across to cover the outswing and defends this length delivery very watchfully

short_text: Boult to Ishan Kishan, no run, covers the line and keeps it out
full_text: Boult to Ishan Kishan, no run, covers the line and keeps it out

short_text: Boult to Ishan Kishan, no run, oh Boult won't mind Ishan Kishan pushing away from the body at this outswinger, played to
full_text: Boult to Ishan Kishan, no run, oh Boult won't mind Ishan Kishan pushing away from the body at this outswinger, played to point

short_text: Boult to Ishan Kishan, no run, , not given and good call from umpire Richard Kettleborough. So after seeing Ishan Kishan
full_text: Boult to Ishan Kishan, no run, , not given and good call from umpire Richard Kettleborough. So after seeing Ishan Kishan walk across previous ball, it was evident Boult was going to angle it into the pads than look to swing it away, Kishan misses the flick, played far too across the line and hit in line with middle and leg but the angle posed enough doubt in the ump's mind and ball-tracker says just clipping top of leg

short_text: Boult to Ishan Kishan, no run, Kishan consciously move across the stumps to negate swing on this fullish delivery, block
full_text: Boult to Ishan Kishan, no run, Kishan consciously move across the stumps to negate swing on this fullish delivery, blocks with the full face of the bat to mid-on

short_text: Boult to Rahul, 1 run, now Boult goes for the killer inswinging yorker, goes also a low full toss around off stump, KL d
full_text: Boult to Rahul, 1 run, now Boult goes for the killer inswinging yorker, goes also a low full toss around off stump, KL digs out in front of cover-point and it's an easy run this time. India are off the mark

short_text: Boult to Rahul, no run, oh very keen there KL. He tapped this short of length delivery in front of point and set off, Is
full_text: Boult to Rahul, no run, oh very keen there KL. He tapped this short of length delivery in front of point and set off, Ishan Kishan said no. Good call, would have been very tight and not worth the risk. Just a hint of inward movement there for Boult

short_text: Thakur to Williamson, 1 run, , and a shocking, abject loss for India, who were fancied to go all the way in the World Cu
full_text: Thakur to Williamson, 1 run, , and a shocking, abject loss for India, who were fancied to go all the way in the World Cup. Just works a half-volley down to deep mid-wicket for a single to hand India an absolute thrashing...

short_text: Thakur to Conway, 1 run, into the hip, and that's swat-pulled down to fine leg for a single.
full_text: Thakur to Conway, 1 run, into the hip, and that's swat-pulled down to fine leg for a single.

short_text: Thakur to Williamson, 1 run, good length ball outside off, Williamson opens the face and runs it down to third man for a
full_text: Thakur to Williamson, 1 run, good length ball outside off, Williamson opens the face and runs it down to third man for a single

short_text: Hardik Pandya to Williamson, 1 run, fuller length ball on the stumps, Williamson whips it down to long-on for a single
full_text: Hardik Pandya to Williamson, 1 run, fuller length ball on the stumps, Williamson whips it down to long-on for a single

short_text: Hardik Pandya to Williamson, , full and outside off, Williamson backs into the on-side, gets on his knee and flays it ov
full_text: Hardik Pandya to Williamson, , full and outside off, Williamson backs into the on-side, gets on his knee and flays it over the infield between extra cover and long-off for four...

short_text: Hardik Pandya to Williamson, , short ball, Williamson ducks under it, and that's over head-high...
full_text: Hardik Pandya to Williamson, , short ball, Williamson ducks under it, and that's over head-high...

short_text: Hardik Pandya to Williamson, , that's an outstanding shot! Short ball, nothing wrong with the direction, and he's ramped
full_text: Hardik Pandya to Williamson, , that's an outstanding shot! Short ball, nothing wrong with the direction, and he's ramped it over the hopping keeper to fine leg for four! That's KW's definition of outrageous. Outrageous touch...

short_text: Hardik Pandya to Conway, 1 run, short ball into the body, Conway pulls it down to backward square leg for one
full_text: Hardik Pandya to Conway, 1 run, short ball into the body, Conway pulls it down to backward square leg for one

full_text: Hardik Pandya to Williamson, 1 run, half-volley on middle, and that's whipped away towards wide long-on for a single

short_text: Hardik Pandya to Williamson, no run, back of a length ball on off-stump, tapped on the head towards point
full_text: Hardik Pandya to Williamson, no run, back of a length ball on off-stump, tapped on the head towards point

full_text: Bumrah to Conway, no run, back of a length ball on off-stump, punched off the backfoot towards cover

short_text: Bumrah to Conway, no run, slower one on a good length, Conway is early into the attempted glance, and that's struck him
full_text: Bumrah to Conway, no run, slower one on a good length, Conway is early into the attempted glance, and that's struck him high on the pads as he misses it

short_text: Bumrah to Daryl Mitchell, Caught by Rahul!! A wicket against the run of play! Mitchell falls one run short of his maiden
full_text: Bumrah to Daryl Mitchell, Caught by Rahul!! A wicket against the run of play! Mitchell falls one run short of his maiden T20I half-century! Lofts this through the line trying to clear long-on, but doesn't get the timing quite right, and it's straight down the throat of KL at long-on.

short_text: Bumrah to Daryl Mitchell, no run, diping yorker, Daryl Mitchell gets forward and converts it into a low full-toss, misti
full_text: Bumrah to Daryl Mitchell, no run, diping yorker, Daryl Mitchell gets forward and converts it into a low full-toss, mistimes it off the toe towards mid-on

short_text: Bumrah to Daryl Mitchell, , effort ball, short ball, but it's angling down leg - wide called
full_text: Bumrah to Daryl Mitchell, , effort ball, short ball, but it's angling down leg - wide called

full_text: Bumrah to Williamson, 1 run, taps a back of a length ball on the head and glides it down to third man for a single

full_text: Bumrah to Williamson, no run, very full ball on middle, and that's whip-driven towards mid-on

full_text: Hardik Pandya to Williamson, 1 run, gets low and pulls another back of a lengther away to backward square leg for a single

full_text: Hardik Pandya to Daryl Mitchell, 1 run, short and into the chest, another little guided pull down to backward square leg for a single

full_text: Hardik Pandya to Williamson, 1 run, fuller length ball on middle and leg, check-driven down to long-on for a single

short_text: Hardik Pandya to Daryl Mitchell, 1 run, back of a length ball on the thigh, Daryl Mitchell jackknifes low into a guided
full_text: Hardik Pandya to Daryl Mitchell, 1 run, back of a length ball on the thigh, Daryl Mitchell jackknifes low into a guided pull to backward square leg for a single

short_text: Hardik Pandya to Williamson, 1 run, tucks this away off the hip to deep square leg for a single
full_text: Hardik Pandya to Williamson, 1 run, tucks this away off the hip to deep square leg for a single

full_text: Hardik Pandya to Williamson, no run, fuller length ball outside off, Williamson opens the face and slices it towards the man at point

short_text: Bumrah to Williamson, 1 run, runs a back of a length ball without any width down to third man for a single
full_text: Bumrah to Williamson, 1 run, runs a back of a length ball without any width down to third man for a single

short_text: Bumrah to Williamson, , short ball, bounces over Williamson's head as he tries to ramp it over Pant, misses, and that's
full_text: Bumrah to Williamson, , short ball, bounces over Williamson's head as he tries to ramp it over Pant, misses, and that's too high - wide called

short_text: Bumrah to Williamson, 2 runs, tails a little towards leg-stump, and that's clipped away towards deep mid-wicket for a co
full_text: Bumrah to Williamson, 2 runs, tails a little towards leg-stump, and that's clipped away towards deep mid-wicket for a couple

short_text: Bumrah to Williamson, no run, loopy yorker length ball on off-stump, Williamson scoops it out towards cover where Kohli
full_text: Bumrah to Williamson, no run, loopy yorker length ball on off-stump, Williamson scoops it out towards cover where Kohli dives it cuts it off

full_text: Bumrah to Williamson, no run, opens the face and steers a good length ball towards cover point

short_text: Bumrah to Daryl Mitchell, 1 run, short ball, zips through into the batsman's body, mistimes that in the air towards mid-
full_text: Bumrah to Daryl Mitchell, 1 run, short ball, zips through into the batsman's body, mistimes that in the air towards mid-wicket for a single

short_text: Bumrah to Williamson, 1 run, short of length ball on off, taps this on the head and glides it down to third man for one
full_text: Bumrah to Williamson, 1 run, short of length ball on off, taps this on the head and glides it down to third man for one

short_text: Thakur to Daryl Mitchell, no run, finally nails the yorker, and that's dug out towards mid-off, and finally a dot ball a
full_text: Thakur to Daryl Mitchell, no run, finally nails the yorker, and that's dug out towards mid-off, and finally a dot ball after an expensive over...

short_text: Thakur to Daryl Mitchell, , this spells doom for India! A rank half-volley, and that's crunched flat over the bowler's h
full_text: Thakur to Daryl Mitchell, , this spells doom for India! A rank half-volley, and that's crunched flat over the bowler's head towards the long-off fence for four. This is carnage. He's toying with Shardul...

short_text: Thakur to Daryl Mitchell, , this is butchery in the larger context - clobbers a short ball with a dragged pull from outs
full_text: Thakur to Daryl Mitchell, , this is butchery in the larger context - clobbers a short ball with a dragged pull from outside off to deep mid-wicket for four

short_text: Thakur to Daryl Mitchell, no run, it's seamed away, and it beats the outside edge of the massive straight swing
full_text: Thakur to Daryl Mitchell, no run, it's seamed away, and it beats the outside edge of the massive straight swing

short_text: Thakur to Daryl Mitchell, , he's leathered that! Picks this from a length and smokes this over cow corner for a massive
full_text: Thakur to Daryl Mitchell, , he's leathered that! Picks this from a length and smokes this over cow corner for a massive six! This is rust on sharp raw flesh for India...

short_text: Thakur to Daryl Mitchell, no run, back of a length ball with some width outside off, slapped away towards mid-off
full_text: Thakur to Daryl Mitchell, no run, back of a length ball with some width outside off, slapped away towards mid-off

full_text: Chakaravarthy to Daryl Mitchell, 1 run, flat and full on middle, and that's check-driven to a straight long-on for a single

full_text: Chakaravarthy to Williamson, 1 run, gets forward and defends this off the inside edge towards square leg for a single

short_text: Chakaravarthy to Daryl Mitchell, 1 run, flat and on a length on middle, and that's cross-batted down to long-on for a si
full_text: Chakaravarthy to Daryl Mitchell, 1 run, flat and on a length on middle, and that's cross-batted down to long-on for a single

short_text: Chakaravarthy to Williamson, 1 run, skids through outside off, Williamson chops it to backward point for a single, but t
full_text: Chakaravarthy to Williamson, 1 run, skids through outside off, Williamson chops it to backward point for a single, but this was close - Jadeja came in from backward point and fired in a throw, missed with the direct hit. Could've been close...

short_text: Chakaravarthy to Daryl Mitchell, 1 run, charges down the wicket to the pitch of it, and whips it uppishly over the infie
full_text: Chakaravarthy to Daryl Mitchell, 1 run, charges down the wicket to the pitch of it, and whips it uppishly over the infield to deep mid-wicket for one

short_text: Chakaravarthy to Daryl Mitchell, no run, fired in flat outside off, Daryl Mitchell gets across and attempts a cute lap-s
full_text: Chakaravarthy to Daryl Mitchell, no run, fired in flat outside off, Daryl Mitchell gets across and attempts a cute lap-sweep, and is struck on the pads but outside the lne of off-stump

short_text: Jadeja to Williamson, no run, flat and quick on off-stump, opens the face and steers it towards point
full_text: Jadeja to Williamson, no run, flat and quick on off-stump, opens the face and steers it towards point

full_text: Jadeja to Williamson, 2 runs, opens up his stance and scoops that with the spin, inside out towards deep extra cover for a couple

short_text: Jadeja to Daryl Mitchell, 1 run, tucks this away off the backfoot to deep mid-wicket for a single
full_text: Jadeja to Daryl Mitchell, 1 run, tucks this away off the backfoot to deep mid-wicket for a single

short_text: Jadeja to Williamson, 1 run, punches a skidder to sweeper cover for a single
full_text: Jadeja to Williamson, 1 run, punches a skidder to sweeper cover for a single

short_text: Jadeja to Williamson, , angling towards the stumps, straightens, Williamson stays low and opens the face, very close to
full_text: Jadeja to Williamson, , angling towards the stumps, straightens, Williamson stays low and opens the face, very close to the stumps, and steers it away to the third man fence for four. Touch of class...

short_text: Jadeja to Daryl Mitchell, 1 run, fired into the pads, and that's worked away softly towards deep mid-wicket for a single
full_text: Jadeja to Daryl Mitchell, 1 run, fired into the pads, and that's worked away softly towards deep mid-wicket for a single

short_text: Shami to Daryl Mitchell, 1 run, pacy short delivery, skids on and cramps up Daryl Mitchell but he gets a single away
full_text: Shami to Daryl Mitchell, 1 run, pacy short delivery, skids on and cramps up Daryl Mitchell but he gets a single away

short_text: Shami to Daryl Mitchell, , that has gone all the way? Yes it has. Off-pace short ball on off, Daryl Mitchell sort of dra
full_text: Shami to Daryl Mitchell, , that has gone all the way? Yes it has. Off-pace short ball on off, Daryl Mitchell sort of drags the pull but he is so heavily-built that even mishits carry over. There's no fielder at deep square anyway and it just clears the cushions

short_text: Shami to Daryl Mitchell, no run, full and Daryl Mitchell crunches the off-drive but straight to the fielder at mid-off
full_text: Shami to Daryl Mitchell, no run, full and Daryl Mitchell crunches the off-drive but straight to the fielder at mid-off

short_text: Shami to Williamson, 1 run, short of length outside off, Williamson advances and drives wide of cover, didn't time it we
full_text: Shami to Williamson, 1 run, short of length outside off, Williamson advances and drives wide of cover, didn't time it well but placed it

short_text: Shami to Williamson, , don't need wides when defending such a low score. Short and down leg. Kohli with a smile checks w
full_text: Shami to Williamson, , don't need wides when defending such a low score. Short and down leg. Kohli with a smile checks with the umpire whether it is not one short ball for the over

short_text: Shami to Daryl Mitchell, 1 run, Daryl Mitchell will keep going for it, even if we are outside the powerplay. Length ball
full_text: Shami to Daryl Mitchell, 1 run, Daryl Mitchell will keep going for it, even if we are outside the powerplay. Length ball on off, slogged off a thick inside-edge behind square

short_text: Shami to Williamson, 1 run, short of length outside off, dabbed wide of backward point, there was a chance of a second b
full_text: Shami to Williamson, 1 run, short of length outside off, dabbed wide of backward point, there was a chance of a second but Williamson isn't keen

short_text: Jadeja to Daryl Mitchell, no run, this is another poor ball, but Daryl Mitchell has found extra-cover with a hard cut, s
full_text: Jadeja to Daryl Mitchell, no run, this is another poor ball, but Daryl Mitchell has found extra-cover with a hard cut, short and wide outside off, Jadeja lucky to get away with that one

short_text: Jadeja to Daryl Mitchell, , that's a hit-me ball. Short and wide outside off, with fielders inside the ring, Daryl Mitch
full_text: Jadeja to Daryl Mitchell, , that's a hit-me ball. Short and wide outside off, with fielders inside the ring, Daryl Mitchell picks cover-point and thrashes the cut through that area. Indian fans in the stands go glum

short_text: Jadeja to Daryl Mitchell, , that is a class shot. Daryl Mitchell showing he's not all about brawn. Here's his touch skil
full_text: Jadeja to Daryl Mitchell, , that is a class shot. Daryl Mitchell showing he's not all about brawn. Here's his touch skills on display, back of a length delivery on middle, he goes back and whips it over  mid-wicket, the wrists doing all the work and it races away over the infield

short_text: Jadeja to Daryl Mitchell, no run, immediately it is quicker, flat dart on the stumps, defended
full_text: Jadeja to Daryl Mitchell, no run, immediately it is quicker, flat dart on the stumps, defended

short_text: Jadeja to Daryl Mitchell, , this is what he has been sent for. Bit too full on this tossed up delivery, Daryl Mitchell g
full_text: Jadeja to Daryl Mitchell, , this is what he has been sent for. Bit too full on this tossed up delivery, Daryl Mitchell goes big with the loft and he's a monster of a man, when he connects, it sails into the crowd, at long-on

short_text: Jadeja to Daryl Mitchell, no run, Daryl Mitchell comes down the track but the length is shortened, nudged to mid-wicket
full_text: Jadeja to Daryl Mitchell, no run, Daryl Mitchell comes down the track but the length is shortened, nudged to mid-wicket

short_text: Chakaravarthy to Williamson, no run, bit slower to the last one, Williamson turns it to mid-wicket
full_text: Chakaravarthy to Williamson, no run, bit slower to the last one, Williamson turns it to mid-wicket

full_text: Chakaravarthy to Williamson, no run, quicker on the stumps, defended

full_text: Chakaravarthy to Daryl Mitchell, 1 run, beaten in the flight, there's a miscue but mid-on is back so the ball will land in no-man's land

short_text: Chakaravarthy to Daryl Mitchell, no run, dangerous shot, Daryl Mitchell reverse-sweeps to a full ball but manages bat on
full_text: Chakaravarthy to Daryl Mitchell, no run, dangerous shot, Daryl Mitchell reverse-sweeps to a full ball but manages bat on it, straight to the fielder at short third though

short_text: Chakaravarthy to Williamson, 1 run, what soft hands that is. He's beaten by the length there, should've ben forward to t
full_text: Chakaravarthy to Williamson, 1 run, what soft hands that is. He's beaten by the length there, should've ben forward to this fullish ball, but hangs back and the dexterity of his hands take over, dabbed past Pant

short_text: Chakaravarthy to Williamson, no run, floated up on middle, gently nudged to mid-wicket, Williamson wants a run but it's
full_text: Chakaravarthy to Williamson, no run, floated up on middle, gently nudged to mid-wicket, Williamson wants a run but it's not there

short_text: Bumrah to Williamson, 1 run, now the Kane Williamson dab-show to the third man region starts. Length ball outside off, s
full_text: Bumrah to Williamson, 1 run, now the Kane Williamson dab-show to the third man region starts. Length ball outside off, soft hands does the job and Daryl Mitchell has to be credited as well, he called his skipper through

short_text: Bumrah to Daryl Mitchell, 3 runs, the attempted yorker, turns out to be a low full-toss outside off, driven wide of extr
full_text: Bumrah to Daryl Mitchell, 3 runs, the attempted yorker, turns out to be a low full-toss outside off, driven wide of extra-cover, it passes Pandya who chases and then at the end dives to pull it back. They come back for an easy three

short_text: Bumrah to Guptill, Caught by Thakur!! Bumrah gets Guptill now. Slower ball into the pitch on a good length, Guptill want
full_text: Bumrah to Guptill, Caught by Thakur!! Bumrah gets Guptill now. Slower ball into the pitch on a good length, Guptill wanted to loft but completely miscued it - as the bottom hand came off - Thakur at mid-on almost allowed that to pop out, but hangs onto the rebound. Guptill goes watching the replay on the big screen.

short_text: Bumrah to Guptill, , just over Hardik Pandya's leaping right-hand at mid-off. Guptill takes on Bumrah, was on a hard len
full_text: Bumrah to Guptill, , just over Hardik Pandya's leaping right-hand at mid-off. Guptill takes on Bumrah, was on a hard length, but the opener lofts and doesn't come off the middle, but the elevation will do

short_text: Bumrah to Guptill, no run, yorker on off, kept out to cover by Guptill
full_text: Bumrah to Guptill, no run, yorker on off, kept out to cover by Guptill

short_text: Bumrah to Guptill, no run, not too sure there was a single there, Guptill looks for it but is sent back by Daryl Mitchel
full_text: Bumrah to Guptill, no run, not too sure there was a single there, Guptill looks for it but is sent back by Daryl Mitchell and then gives a thumbs up to his partner in acknowledgement. On a short of length on off, dabbed into the ground and it bounces straight behind the stumps towards Pant

short_text: Bumrah to Daryl Mitchell, , short and down leg, Daryl Mitchell pulls and misses, was going away from Pant, who dives and
full_text: Bumrah to Daryl Mitchell, , short and down leg, Daryl Mitchell pulls and misses, was going away from Pant, who dives and parries the ball down. Saved three with that great effort

short_text: Chakaravarthy to Guptill, 2 runs, short and skiddy on the stumps, Guptill sits down and pulls behind square, Jadeja keep
full_text: Chakaravarthy to Guptill, 2 runs, short and skiddy on the stumps, Guptill sits down and pulls behind square, Jadeja keeps it to a couple

short_text: Chakaravarthy to Daryl Mitchell, 1 run, tossed up outside off, Daryl Mitchell gets across and slogs, off a thick inside-
full_text: Chakaravarthy to Daryl Mitchell, 1 run, tossed up outside off, Daryl Mitchell gets across and slogs, off a thick inside-half behind square

short_text: Chakaravarthy to Guptill, 1 run, this is a mishit but luckily for Guptill it lands well short of long-on, the bat turned
full_text: Chakaravarthy to Guptill, 1 run, this is a mishit but luckily for Guptill it lands well short of long-on, the bat turned as he went hard on the loft

short_text: Chakaravarthy to Guptill, , when Guptill lofts, it's one of the most beautiful sights in world cricket. Tossed up around
full_text: Chakaravarthy to Guptill, , when Guptill lofts, it's one of the most beautiful sights in world cricket. Tossed up around off, Guptill just hits straight through the line and mid-off is just a spectator

short_text: Chakaravarthy to Guptill, , short and wide and four. Poor ball from Chakaravarthy, dragged down, Guptill pounces and cut
full_text: Chakaravarthy to Guptill, , short and wide and four. Poor ball from Chakaravarthy, dragged down, Guptill pounces and cuts hard behind point. Rohit grimaces

short_text: Chakaravarthy to Guptill, no run, length ball on middle, turned to mid-wicket
full_text: Chakaravarthy to Guptill, no run, length ball on middle, turned to mid-wicket

short_text: Bumrah to Daryl Mitchell, no run, fantastic opening over from Bumrah, nails the yorker on middle, Daryl Mitchell somehow
full_text: Bumrah to Daryl Mitchell, no run, fantastic opening over from Bumrah, nails the yorker on middle, Daryl Mitchell somehow gets his bat down in time

short_text: Bumrah to Daryl Mitchell, no run, going down and everyone knew it. That swung late and had Daryl Mitchell in lots of tro
full_text: Bumrah to Daryl Mitchell, no run, going down and everyone knew it. That swung late and had Daryl Mitchell in lots of trouble, the attempted yorker, but it's sliding down as Mitchell misses the flick. Immediately Bumrah knows it and shakes his head quashing any thoughts of a review

short_text: Bumrah to Guptill, 1 run, slip goes out and Bumrah bowls a back of a length delivery on middle and leg, defended wide of
full_text: Bumrah to Guptill, 1 run, slip goes out and Bumrah bowls a back of a length delivery on middle and leg, defended wide of mid-on for a single

short_text: Bumrah to Guptill, no run, again. Bumrah going for wickets up top, yorker length delivery on the stumps, Guptill keeps i
full_text: Bumrah to Guptill, no run, again. Bumrah going for wickets up top, yorker length delivery on the stumps, Guptill keeps it out

full_text: Bumrah to Guptill, no run, very full, looking for the yorker straightaway, dug out by Guptill

full_text: Bumrah to Guptill, no run, inward slant for Bumrah, a hint of swing too, Guptill drives off the inside-half to mid-on as it was bowled fuller on the stumps

short_text: Chakaravarthy to Daryl Mitchell, no run, length ball outside off, pushed to point, confusion between Daryl Mitchell and
full_text: Chakaravarthy to Daryl Mitchell, no run, length ball outside off, pushed to point, confusion between Daryl Mitchell and Guptill but all's well as they retreat into their creases

full_text: Chakaravarthy to Guptill, 1 run, tossed up full on the stumps, Guptill pushes a single to long-on

short_text: Chakaravarthy to Daryl Mitchell, leg byes, 1 run, Daryl Mitchell did well there, was down the track, had to get somethin
full_text: Chakaravarthy to Daryl Mitchell, leg byes, 1 run, Daryl Mitchell did well there, was down the track, had to get something in the ball's way as it was fired down leg, the pads do the job otherwise Pant would've had a stumping chance

full_text: Chakaravarthy to Guptill, 1 run, bit slower on the stumps, Guptill waits and then pushes it to long-on for a single

full_text: Chakaravarthy to Guptill, no run, sliding straight on, to middle and leg, Guptill defends to mid-on

full_text: Chakaravarthy to Guptill, 2 runs, floated up on middle, Guptill is a bit late on the flick but gets it off a thick inside-half of the bat behind square for a couple
